{"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:P/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:P/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-613", "name": "Insufficient Session Expiration"}], "description": "### Summary
The logout button does not clear the session. The previous user stays logged in unless another user explicitly logs in.

### Details
Not in auto login mode. Hosted on localhost. `access_token_lf` remains present in both Local Storage and Cookies. `refresh_token_lf` remains present in Cookies.

**Root cause:** the `/logout` endpoint deleted the authentication cookies without matching the original `httponly`/`samesite`/`secure`/`domain` parameters, so the browser kept them; additionally the frontend did not clear the auth cookies on logout.

```
LANGFLOW_AUTO_LOGIN: "False"
LANGFLOW_SUPERUSER: <set>
LANGFLOW_SUPERUSER_PASSWORD: <set>
LANGFLOW_SECRET_KEY: <set>
LANGFLOW_NEW_USER_IS_ACTIVE: "False"
LANGFLOW_ENABLE_SUPERUSER_CLI: "False"
```

### PoC
Click Logout. Hit refresh to return to previous screen.

### Impact
Users on shared computers may falsely believe they have terminated their session.

### Patches
Fixed in **1.7.0** (PRs #10527 and #10528). The logout endpoint now deletes the auth cookies using the same parameters they were created with, and the frontend clears the auth cookies on logout. Upgrade to **1.7.0 or later**.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00152, "percentile": 0.04708}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7hw8-6q6r-4276", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:17:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7hw8-6q6r-4276", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7hw8-6q6r-4276"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55423"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T21:17:01Z", "references": ["https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/security/advisories/GHSA-7hw8-6q6r-4276", "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/pull/10527", "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/pull/10528", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7hw8-6q6r-4276"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/langflow-ai/langflow/security-advisories/GHSA-7hw8-6q6r-4276", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow", "summary": "Langflow: Logout button does not clear session", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T21:17:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7hw8-6q6r-4276", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.7.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "langflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.7.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Langflow: Logout button does not clear session
